sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.content: Does MeroGhar cover all 7 provinces of Nepal? Yes — MeroGhar covers all 77 districts across Nepal's 7 provinces. From Kathmandu to Karnali and Sudurpashchim, we have verified movers everywhere. For hill and mountain routes, we confirm road access before finalizing your booking, especially during monsoon season (June–September). How quickly will I receive a quote after submitting the form? Every service your Nepal move needs

paragraphs: Services How It Works Province Coverage Reviews FAQ Book a Move →
Connect with verified, rated household movers across all 7 provinces of Nepal — from Kathmandu to Karnali. Free quote within 2 hours. eSewa · Khalti · Cash accepted.
✅ Verified Movers Only · 🇳🇵 All 7 Provinces of Nepal · 💬 Viber & Phone Support · 🪔 Auspicious Timing Respected · 💜 eSewa · Khalti · IME Pay Why MeroGhar?

We built MeroGhar because Nepal has unique moving challenges — narrow Kathmandu lanes, monsoon-blocked hill roads, auspicious timing requirements, and carrying heavy stone grinders up four flights of stairs. Our movers get all of it.
From Kathmandu to Humla — we have verified movers across every district of Nepal.
Tell us your move time — even a 5 AM start — and our crew will be at your door on the dot.
Cargo tempo for tight alleys, mini truck for inter-city, large truck for full household moves.
Our coordinators communicate over Viber and phone — no complicated apps needed.
Pack, load, transport, and unload — complete door-to-door service with a dedicated crew and verified truck.
Already have a vehicle? Our team packs everything safely and loads your truck or tempo efficiently.
Narrow lane-friendly tempo for Kathmandu Valley intra-city moves. Fast, affordable, and local.
Wardrobes, beds, dressing tables — carefully taken apart and reassembled at your new home.
Secure, weather-protected short or long-term storage facilities near major cities across Nepal.
Optional full-replacement coverage on all items moved. Complete peace of mind on every move.

Our team confirms route access before your move date and recommends water-resistant packaging for all moves during this period. Customer Stories Trusted by families across Nepal ★★★★★ "Our Kathmandu to Pokhara move was completely stress-free. The team handled our prayer room and all the religious items with exceptional care. Nothing was damaged. Highly recommended!" PR Priya Rai Kathmandu → Pokhara ★★★★★ "Our auspicious move time was 6 AM — MeroGhar's team arrived at 5:50 sharp! They also managed to bring a cargo tempo through our narrow lane in Lalitpur which other movers refused to do. Absolute 10/10." SK Sanjay Karki Lalitpur → Bhaktapur ★★★★★ "Moving from Biratnagar to Kathmandu with a full 2 BHK — they sent a mini truck with 3 helpers. The wardrobe and bed were disassembled and reassembled perfectly. Paid via Khalti, super easy." AS Anita Shrestha Biratnagar → Kathmandu ★★★★☆ "Moving from Pokhara to Butwal — I had a very heavy stone grinder to move too. The porter team handled it carefully. I liked that I could specify special items directly in the booking form." BT Bijaya Thapa Pokhara → Butwal ★★★★★ "I was surprised MeroGhar covers Dhangadhi! The coordinator called me within an hour, spoke clearly, and arranged everything. Paid via eSewa and all my belongings arrived safe. Great service." KD Kamala Deuba Dhangadhi, Sudurpashchim ★★★★★ "Moving from Nuwakot to Kathmandu on a hill road — I was nervous about damage. MeroGhar confirmed road access before booking and sent an experienced driver. Nothing was damaged. Very professional." RM Ram Maharjan Nuwakot → Kathmandu 4.8 ★ Overall Rating 6 k+ Verified Reviews 97 % Would Recommend FAQ Frequently Asked Questions Does MeroGhar cover all 7 provinces of Nepal? Yes — MeroGhar covers all 77 districts across Nepal's 7 provinces. From Kathmandu to Karnali and Sudurpashchim, we have verified movers everywhere. For hill and mountain routes, we confirm road access before finalizing your booking, especially during monsoon season (June–September). How quickly will I receive a quote after submitting the form? Our coordinator will call you on Viber or phone within 2 hours of form submission to confirm your NPR quote and moving team. For urgent same-day moves, please call us directly at +977 980-000-000. Can you accommodate auspicious move timings? Absolutely. We respect auspicious timing traditions. Simply mention your required move time in the Special Notes field during Step 4 of the booking form — even if it's a very early start like 4 or 5 AM. Our crew will be there on the dot. Can you navigate Kathmandu's narrow lanes? Yes! Cargo tempos are our narrow-lane specialists. When filling out the form in Step 1, select "Narrow lane" under the Road Access option and we will dispatch the right vehicle accordingly. For buildings with only staircase access, we can also arrange additional porter help. Do you accept eSewa and Khalti payments? Yes! We accept eSewa, Khalti, IME Pay, ConnectIPS, Bank Transfer, and Cash. A small token payment is collected via your chosen digital method to confirm the booking, with the remaining balance paid on move day. Can you safely move religious items and heavy stone grinders? Yes. In Step 2 of the form, select "Religious Statues" or "Stone Grinder" under Cultural Items, and describe any special handling requirements in the notes field. Our team treats all religious and fragile items with exceptional care, including specialized wrapping and careful manual handling. Get Started Today Ready to move your home? Fill out our 5-minute form. Get a free NPR quote in 2 hours. Move with complete confidence. Login → 📞 Call Us Directly +977 980-000-000 · Viber / WhatsApp · info@meroghar.com.np M Mero Ghar Nepal's most trusted household moving logistics platform. Serving all 7 provinces since 2021. 📞 +977 980-000-000 💬 Viber: +977 980-000-000 📧 info@meroghar.com.np Services Full-Service Moving

faq.question: Does MeroGhar cover all 7 provinces of Nepal?
faq.answer: Yes — MeroGhar covers all 77 districts across Nepal's 7 provinces. From Kathmandu to Karnali and Sudurpashchim, we have verified movers everywhere. For hill and mountain routes, we confirm road access before finalizing your booking, especially during monsoon season (June–September).

faq.question: How quickly will I receive a quote after submitting the form?
faq.answer: Our coordinator will call you on Viber or phone within 2 hours of form submission to confirm your NPR quote and moving team. For urgent same-day moves, please call us directly at +977 980-000-000.

faq.question: Can you accommodate auspicious move timings?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We respect auspicious timing traditions. Simply mention your required move time in the Special Notes field during Step 4 of the booking form — even if it's a very early start like 4 or 5 AM. Our crew will be there on the dot.

faq.question: Can you navigate Kathmandu's narrow lanes?
faq.answer: Yes! Cargo tempos are our narrow-lane specialists. When filling out the form in Step 1, select "Narrow lane" under the Road Access option and we will dispatch the right vehicle accordingly. For buildings with only staircase access, we can also arrange additional porter help.

faq.question: Do you accept eSewa and Khalti payments?
faq.answer: Yes! We accept eSewa, Khalti, IME Pay, ConnectIPS, Bank Transfer, and Cash. A small token payment is collected via your chosen digital method to confirm the booking, with the remaining balance paid on move day.

faq.question: Can you safely move religious items and heavy stone grinders?
faq.answer: Yes. In Step 2 of the form, select "Religious Statues" or "Stone Grinder" under Cultural Items, and describe any special handling requirements in the notes field. Our team treats all religious and fragile items with exceptional care, including specialized wrapping and careful manual handling.

reviews.text: Our Kathmandu to Pokhara move was completely stress-free. The team handled our prayer room and all the religious items with exceptional care. Nothing was damaged. Highly recommended!

Our auspicious move time was 6 AM — MeroGhar's team arrived at 5:50 sharp! They also managed to bring a cargo tempo through our narrow lane in Lalitpur which other movers refused to do. Absolute 10/10.
Moving from Biratnagar to Kathmandu with a full 2 BHK — they sent a mini truck with 3 helpers. The wardrobe and bed were disassembled and reassembled perfectly. Paid via Khalti, super easy.
Moving from Pokhara to Butwal — I had a very heavy stone grinder to move too. The porter team handled it carefully. I liked that I could specify special items directly in the booking form.
I was surprised MeroGhar covers Dhangadhi! The coordinator called me within an hour, spoke clearly, and arranged everything. Paid via eSewa and all my belongings arrived safe. Great service.
Moving from Nuwakot to Kathmandu on a hill road — I was nervous about damage. MeroGhar confirmed road access before booking and sent an experienced driver. Nothing was damaged. Very professional.

howItWorks.title: Fill the Form
howItWorks.description: Province, district, items, vehicle type, and preferred date - our 5-step form takes under 3 minutes.

howItWorks.title: Get Matched
howItWorks.description: We match you with a verified, rated mover available in your district within 2 hours of your request.

howItWorks.title: Confirm & Pay
howItWorks.description: Review your NPR quote over Viber or phone. Pay a token amount via eSewa, Khalti, or cash to secure your slot.

howItWorks.title: Move Day!
howItWorks.description: The crew arrives on time even for early auspicious timings. Relax and enjoy your new home.
